description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono:latest Docker image. Add a before_script that runs apt-get update -y and installs fsharp, libgomp1, libstdc++6 and liblmdb0. Define a build job in the build stage that executes mono .paket/paket.exe restore, chmod +x packages/zen_z3_linux/output/z3-linux, chmod +x packages/SpecFlow/tools/specflow.exe, msbuild src/zenprotocol.sln, copies packages/zen_secp256k1_linux/output/libsecp256k1.so to /usr/lib, and finally runs ./run-tests. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
